indications.text:
EPIDUO FORTE is indicated for the topical treatment of acne vulgaris in adults and pediatric patients 12 years of
age and older.

EPIDUO FORTE is indicated for the topical treatment of acne vulgaris in adults and pediatric patients 12 years of
age and older.
